Business: Shree Ram Proteins Limited engages in cotton seeds extraction business in India. Its products include cotton linter, seed hull, seed meal, seed wash oil, and seed refine oil; and soyabean meal, rapeseed meal, groundnut meal, and raw cotton bales. The company also exports its products. Shree Ram Proteins Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based…

  Current: 3.62 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 15.84  (-6.27% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
